testcase.name: Auth redirects › /agenda redirects unauthenticated visitor to landing page
testcase.error:
[chromium] › auth-redirects.spec.ts:14:5 › Auth redirects › /agenda redirects unauthenticated visitor to landing page
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:3000/agenda Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:3000/agenda", waiting until "domcontentloaded"
13 | for (const route of protectedRoutes) { 14 | test(`${route} redirects unauthenticated visitor to landing page`, async ({ page }) => { > 15 | await page.goto(route, { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' }) | ^ 16 | await expect(page).toHaveURL('/') 17 | // Confirm the landing page is shown, not an error page 18 | await expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: /Terminplanung/ })).toBeVisible() at /home/justus/Projects/chronos-frontend/e2e/auth-redirects.spec.ts:15:18
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/auth-redirects-Auth-redire-9338e-ted-visitor-to-landing-page-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/auth-redirects-Auth-redire-9338e-ted-visitor-to-landing-page-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: Landing Page › renders hero heading and tagline
testcase.error:
[chromium] › landing.spec.ts:9:3 › Landing Page › renders hero heading and tagline ───────────────
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:3000/ Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:3000/", waiting until "domcontentloaded"
8 | test.describe('Landing Page', () => { 9 | test('renders hero heading and tagline', async ({ page }) => { > 10 | await page.goto('/', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' }) | ^ 11 | await expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: /Terminplanung/ })).toBeVisible() 12 | await expect(page.getByText('Für Jugendverbände gemacht')).toBeVisible() 13 | }) at /home/justus/Projects/chronos-frontend/e2e/landing.spec.ts:10:16

testcase.name: Landing Page › renders hero heading and tagline
testcase.error:
[mobile-chrome] › landing.spec.ts:9:3 › Landing Page › renders hero heading and tagline ──────────
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:3000/ Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:3000/", waiting until "domcontentloaded"
8 | test.describe('Landing Page', () => { 9 | test('renders hero heading and tagline', async ({ page }) => { > 10 | await page.goto('/', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' }) | ^ 11 | await expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: /Terminplanung/ })).toBeVisible() 12 | await expect(page.getByText('Für Jugendverbände gemacht')).toBeVisible() 13 | }) at /home/justus/Projects/chronos-frontend/e2e/landing.spec.ts:10:16
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/landing-Landing-Page-renders-hero-heading-and-tagline-mobile-chrome/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/landing-Landing-Page-renders-hero-heading-and-tagline-mobile-chrome/error-context.md
